fact_nuggets.text: Swift Swim (Japanese: Smooth Swim) is an Ability introduced in Generation III.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Boosts attack frequency if it is raining. MD T D S Raises the number of moves the Pokemon attempts per turn when it is raining. B S L MD GtI In the Rain weather condition, it can use a move 2 times at once for only 1 PP. * When the Pokemon uses a move in the Rain weather condition, it uses it 2 times at once but only consumes PP for 1 use! * S MD When the Pokemon uses a move in rain, it uses it 2 times at once but only consumes PP for 1 use! MD RT DX When the Pokemon uses a move in Rain or Heavy Rain, it uses the move 2 times at ones, but only consumes PP for 1 use.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] During rain , the Speed stat of Pokemon with this Ability is doubled. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Swift Swim has no effect outside of battle.
In battle [ edit | edit source ] During rain , the Speed stat of Pokemon with this Ability is doubled.
